sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Vantung siklong tum un! Lungdam ni hi a,
Mawh nei mi khat hong ciahkik ta hi;
a ta lampi ah na dawn tuah a,
A taimang a ta a ciahpih hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Gawsem tumin nuamna tawh phat hi;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Vantung siklong tum un! Lungdam ni
Ta taimang tu’n kisangkik ta hi;
A mawhna pan mi khat kihonkhia zo a,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Vantung siklong tum un! Pawi kham ni hi-a,
Lungdam thu tangko un, gamla pi dongah,
A manpha mi khat suak thakzo
